title: quercus geminata f. rolfsii
intro: Quercus geminata f. rolfsii, also known as the Philippine evergreen oak, is a specific variety of evergreen oak tree native to the Philippines. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Quercus geminata f. rolfsii include its potential to alleviate fever, improve respiratory health, and provide relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
